arguments.argument:
event_inherited() bActive=1 image_angle=180
//Enemy base statistics eName="CHAOS Bloominator" eLevel=37 maxLife=130 life=maxLife pointWorth=10 atkPower=12 affiliation=7 weaponGive=6
animate=0 moveDir=0 moveProg=0 runAcc=2 bulletTime=0 if global.shooterDifficulty=1 {bulletMod=6} else {bulletMod=5} bulletDir=0 bulletCheck=0 movePass=0
jeremyText="Just shoot it down." chaoText="Eaten Ability: LASER BEAM#Power: 5 (DPS: 75)#Fire Rate: 15/sec#This laser fires straight and pierces through enemies. It may be weak, but it has the highest fire rate of all weapons." devText="N/A"
